subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Hope, my Refuge and my Goal! Verily, Thy servant whom Thou hast joined unto Thy glorious Name and attributed to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی و رجائی و ملجای و منائی ان عبدک الذی اضفته الی اسمک الجلیل و نسبته الی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
